action.parameter: statHolder.parentArea.room != null && (statHolder.subject.area.room == null || stat.subject.area.room.id != stat.parentArea.room.id) ? stat.parentArea.room.name : stat.parentArea.name
statHolder.parentArea.room != null && (statHolder.subject.area.room == null || stat.subject.area.room.id != stat.parentArea.room.id) ? stat.parentArea.room.name : stat.parentArea.name
